title: Robin Meets Her Past
description: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Sanji, Luffy, Aokiji, Nico Robin, Zoro. Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: has ended up completely ann childhood.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Always leaving her as the sole survivor...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why is that so, Nico Robin Nico?

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: What happened in the past doesn't matter!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What are you trying to do?!

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: I wasn't planning on killing you, but...

summary: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
